content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Special Needs Care Network: Outbound Sales Rep Anywhere in the World Virginia Outreach, Sales, and Communication Skills Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5001/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Reston, VA <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://specialneedsusa.com">https://specialneedsusa.com</a> </p> <h2><span><strong>Outbound Sales Representative (Remote, Part-Time or Full-Time)</strong></span></h2> <p><strong>Special Needs Care Network (SPCN)</strong></p> <h3><span><strong>About Us</strong></span></h3> <p>Special Needs Care Network (SPCN) connects families of children with special needs to trusted schools, ABA therapy clinics, and programs across the country. We help families find care faster and help great providers get discovered at the exact moment families are searching.</p> <hr> <h3><span><strong>The Role</strong></span></h3> <p>We are looking for a <strong>high-performing outbound sales representative</strong> who is confident on the phone, professional in communication, and motivated to close.</p> <p>This is not just cold calling. You will work a mix of:</p> <ul> <li><strong>Warm leads</strong> from families actively searching for care</li> <li><strong>Outbound outreach</strong> to schools and clinics</li> <li><strong>Follow-ups and relationship building</strong></li> </ul> <p>Your goal is to start conversations, get past gatekeepers, and connect directly with decision-makers (owners, principals, clinical directors).</p> <hr> <h3><span><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></span></h3> <ul> <li>Make outbound calls and send emails to schools and ABA clinics</li> <li>Follow up with warm leads and inbound opportunities</li> <li>Navigate gatekeepers and reach decision-makers</li> <li>Present SPCN’s value clearly and professionally</li> <li>Set appointments and close deals when appropriate</li> <li>Maintain organized notes and follow-ups</li> <li>Collaborate with the team and continuously improve</li> </ul> <hr> <h3><span><strong>What We’re Looking For</strong></span></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Minimum 2 years of outbound sales experience</strong> (phone + email)</li> <li>Strong phone presence and ability to build rapport quickly</li> <li>Professional written and verbal communication</li> <li>Comfortable handling both warm and cold outreach</li> <li>Ability to work independently and stay organized</li> <li>A self-starter who takes ownership of results</li> <li>Team-oriented and coachable</li> </ul> <p><strong>Bonus (not required):</strong></p> <ul> <li>Background in healthcare or education</li> <li>Familiarity with special needs, autism, or therapy services</li> </ul> <hr> <h3><span><strong>Work Details</strong></span></h3> <ul> <li>Fully remote</li> <li>Minimum <strong>20 hours per week</strong></li> <li>Flexible schedule</li> </ul> <p>This is a full commission job. Commission goes as low as $15 for quick calls to $3,000 for closers selling large advertising packages.&nbsp;</p> <hr> <h3><span><strong>What Makes This Role Different</strong></span></h3> <ul> <li>You are not calling random lists. Many conversations start with <strong>real family demand</strong></li> <li>You will have access to: <ul> <li>Warm leads</li> <li>Scripts and training</li> <li>Ongoing support</li> <li>A growing database of providers and families</li> </ul> </li> <li>You are helping providers get seen and helping families find care faster</li> </ul> <hr> <h3><span><strong>Who This Is For</strong></span></h3> <p>This role is ideal for someone who:</p> <ul> <li>Enjoys talking to people and opening conversations</li> <li>Is persistent and not afraid of rejection</li> <li>Wants a performance-driven role with real upside</li> <li>Cares about doing meaningful work that helps families</li> </ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/special-needs-care-network-outbound-sales-rep">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/special-needs-care-network-outbound-sales-rep</a></p> Wed, 29 Apr <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States </p> <p>Key Responsibilities:</p><p></p><p>Design, implement, and manage CI/CD pipelines for application deployment.</p><p>Develop and maintain cloud infrastructure primarily in AWS, with secondary responsibilities in Azure, using IaC tools like Terraform or CloudFormation.</p><p>Manage containerized applications using Docker and orchestration platforms like Kubernetes (EKS/AKS).</p><p>Implement and manage monitoring, logging, and alerting solutions to ensure platform reliability and performance.</p><p>Collaborate with development teams to optimize application architecture for the cloud.</p><p>Ensure the security and compliance of the cloud infrastructure.</p><p>Core Qualifications:</p><p></p><p></p> <p>Extensive AWS Experience (80%): Proven, hands-on experience with core AWS services such as EC2, S3, VPC, IAM, RDS, and Lambda. Deep knowledge of AWS networking and security.</p><p>Microsoft Azure Experience (20%): Demonstrable experience with foundational Azure services, including Azure VMs, Blob Storage, Azure AD, and VNet.</p><p>Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Proficiency with tools like Terraform (preferred), CloudFormation, or Ansible.</p><p>CI/CD Tools: Strong experience with Jenkins, GitLab CI, Azure DevOps, or similar.</p><p>Containerization: Solid understanding of Docker and Kubernetes (EKS or AKS).</p><p>Scripting: Competency in a scripting language such as Python, Bash, or PowerShell.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/pierce-technology-corp-devops-engineer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/pierce-technology-corp-devops-engineer</a></p> Wed, 29 Apr 2026 20:35:04 +0000 Fri, 29 May 2026 20:35:04 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/pierce-technology-corp-devops-engineer https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/pierce-technology-corp-devops-engineer Emerchantpay: Senior DevOps Engineer Anywhere in the World Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <p> <str
